query:
-- Bookings for Disney World trip (tripId=1, userId=2)
INSERT INTO bookings (tripId, userId, type, vendor, confirmationNumber, status, checkIn, checkOut, amount, currency, notes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
(1, 2, 'flight', 'Alaska Airlines', 'AS432-PDX-MCO', 'confirmed', '2026-06-14 10:30:00', '2026-06-14 18:50:00', 89400, 'USD', 'Nonstop PDX → MCO. 4 passengers. Seats 18A-18D confirmed.', NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 2, 'flight', 'Alaska Airlines', 'AS431-MCO-PDX', 'confirmed', '2026-06-21 09:15:00', '2026-06-21 13:45:00', 89400, 'USD', 'Return flight MCO → PDX. Nonstop. Seats 22A-22D confirmed.', NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 2, 'hotel', 'Disney''s Polynesian Village Resort', 'POLY-RES-2026-0614', 'confirmed', '2026-06-14 00:00:00', '2026-06-21 00:00:00', 498000, 'USD', 'Deluxe Studio, Longhouse Building, Pool View. 7 nights. Includes Disney dining plan.', NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 2, 'tour', 'Walt Disney World', 'WDW-TICKETS-2026-0614', 'confirmed', '2026-06-15 00:00:00', '2026-06-18 00:00:00', 156000, 'USD', '4-day Park Hopper tickets for 4 guests. Includes Lightning Lane Multi Pass.', NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 2, 'transfer', 'Disney''s Magical Express', 'MAGIC-EXP-6142026', 'confirmed', '2026-06-14 18:50:00', '2026-06-14 20:00:00', 0, 'USD', 'Complimentary resort transportation from MCO to Polynesian Village Resort.', NOW(), NOW());

-- Packing list for Disney World trip (tripId=1, userId=2)
INSERT INTO packing_items (tripId, userId, category, item, isPacked, quantity, notes, sortOrder, createdAt)
VALUES
(1, 2, 'Documents', 'Passports (all 4)', false, 4, 'Check expiration dates — must be valid for 6 months beyond travel date', 1, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Documents', 'Printed flight confirmations', false, 1, 'AS432 and AS431 confirmation emails', 2, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Documents', 'Hotel confirmation (Polynesian)', false, 1, 'POLY-RES-2026-0614', 3, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Documents', 'Travel insurance documents', false, 1, 'Keep a digital copy in the app Document Vault', 4, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Clothing', 'Comfortable walking shoes (2 pairs)', false, 2, 'Break them in before the trip — you''ll walk 10+ miles per day!', 5, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Clothing', 'Light rain ponchos', false, 4, 'Afternoon Florida thunderstorms are very common in June', 6, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Clothing', 'Swimsuits', false, 4, 'The Polynesian pool and Volcano Slide are amazing!', 7, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Clothing', 'Disney-themed outfits', false, 4, 'Optional but so fun! Matching family shirts for Magic Kingdom day', 8, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Essentials', 'Sunscreen (SPF 50+)', false, 2, 'Florida sun is intense. Reapply every 2 hours!', 9, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Essentials', 'Portable phone charger / power bank', false, 2, 'My Disney Experience app drains battery fast', 10, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Essentials', 'MagicBands (will be mailed to you)', false, 4, 'Check your Disney account — they should arrive 2 weeks before travel', 11, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Essentials', 'Reusable water bottles', false, 4, 'Disney has free water at quick service restaurants', 12, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Kids', 'Autograph book & markers', false, 2, 'For character meet-and-greets — kids love this!', 13, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Kids', 'Stroller (or rent at park)', false, 1, 'Disney rents strollers at the park entrance if needed', 14, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Health', 'First aid kit (band-aids, blister pads)', false, 1, 'Blisters are common from all the walking', 15, NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Health', 'Motion sickness medication', false, 1, 'For rides like Mission: SPACE and Star Tours', 16, NOW());
